zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期无明显方向]
zh.content:
当前，Solana/美元（SOL/USD）维持在90.28附近震荡整理，24小时波动幅度较小，仅为0.01%。从价格走势来看，市场情绪相对平稳，没有显著的上涨或下跌动力。短期内，SOL的走势可能受到市场大环境影响，缺乏明显的趋势指引。

技术指标方面，RSI和MACD指标暂时无法提供有效的超买或超卖信号。虽然MACD显示出负值（-0.051336111），但未出现明确的交叉信号，表明市场并未呈现强烈的卖出信号。SMA(20)的价格为90.35，价格接近这一水平，暗示短期内可能继续围绕该均线波动。

支撑位和阻力位的关键区域分别在90.19和90.34。若价格下行至支撑位90.19附近，有可能受到买盘支撑，出现反弹。而上行突破90.34则可能带动价格进一步上涨，打开上行空间。鉴于当前走势缺乏明确方向，区间操作或为更优选择。

交易建议上，考虑到市场震荡整理，建议投资者保持谨慎，避免追高或追低。可以关注价格在支撑与阻力区间内的波动，适时进出。同时，等待更多的技术指标确认，避免因市场不确定性而做出盲目决策。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana (SOL) is currently exhibiting a neutral-to-slightly-bearish tone around $90.28, with the 24-hour change nearly flat at 0.01%. Price movement over the past day has been tightly constrained between $90.19 and $90.34, suggesting consolidation near the short-term moving average. The 20-period SMA at $90.35 is acting as a subtle resistance, indicating that the market lacks strong directional momentum. Traders should watch for a clear breakout above $90.40 for a bullish shift.  

The MACD reading of -0.0513 reflects modest bearish pressure, though the absence of a signal line reduces the clarity of the momentum trend. In this context, short-term oscillators such as RSI would normally help confirm overbought or oversold conditions, but with missing RSI data, market participants should rely more on price action around key levels. The tight range and minimal daily change imply that momentum is weak and traders should avoid aggressive positions until confirmation of trend direction.  

Support appears near $90.19, which aligns with the recent low, while resistance resides around $90.35–$90.40, coinciding with the SMA and recent highs. A breach below $90.19 could open the path to $89.80 or lower, whereas a clean break above $90.40 may target $91.00. These levels are crucial for risk management and can guide position sizing, stop-loss placement, and entry points for short-term trades.  

For traders, a cautious approach is recommended. Range-bound strategies, such as scalping near support and resistance, may be effective, while trend-following setups should wait for decisive confirmation. Given the low volatility and neutral indicators, patience is key, and maintaining tight risk controls will help mitigate unexpected swings. Monitoring macro factors and broader market sentiment could provide additional insight into potential directional shifts for SOL/USD.
